titleStmt.title: SII 27.368: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 368. (A.R. No. 502 of 1928-29.) PERDŪR, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Vīrabhadra temple.
This record is damaged dated Śaka 1379, Dhātu, Tulā 12, Monday corresponding to 1456 A.D., October 11. The Śaka year, however, was current.

It registers a gift of land, by purchase, left in charge of the eleven Janani and the Three hundred of the Brahmasabha, by Basavaṇṇarasa alias Baṅgā, for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple of Janārdanadēva of Peraḍūru, and for making a lamp-stand in bronze.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī hari . śrī gaṇapataEṁ namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdacā
mara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
matu śakavaruṣa sāviradamūnūṟayapatta Oṁbhattaneya dhāta saṁvatsara
da tolāmāsa haṁneraḍaneya sōmavāradalu śrīmatu basavaṁṇarasarā
da baṁgaru peraḍūra janārdana dēvarige Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi yaraḍu
naṁdāvaḷagege takaṁthā yeraḍubeḷe beḷavaṁthā gadeyanu peraḍūra ha
soṁ jananigaḷu mūnūṟa braṁhma sabheya kayiyili hoṁnakoṭṭu
du reya koṁḍu Ā peraḍūra janārdanadēvarige yaraḍanaṁdā beḷaku naḍa
hanoṁdumaṁdi jananigaḷu mūnūṟumaṁdi braṁhmasabheya muṁ
maneṟadu Ā mūlakke yaṁbhattu varahana krayavanū koṭṭu Ā mūlavanū
yaraḍunaṁdābeḷakege yaraḍu kaṁcina ṭhāṇa dīvigeya kaṁbhavanu samarpi
lada nīra koṁḍu yaraḍu naṁdā beḷaka kalpistaṁthā gaddeya catusīme yavi
ḍavi śaṁka biḷiyavana vijate mati daṁ paḍavalu teṁkali Ūrāḷa biḷiya vana gu
ḍḍe yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍavali biḷiyavana hebāruvana tō jiyiṁda mūḍalu
baḍagali baḷiyavana hebāruvana tōjeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya
Oḷaguḷa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidhasādhya Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmya
veṁba mūḍaḍukada gadde hona Aṟuvattaṟa lekkada Āyidu mūḍe yī Eraḍava be
ḷeya Ayidu mūḍe gadeyali Aṟahāḍateṁgina yeṁṇe naḍadu bahadu Ā ga
ddeya bittuvaru Ā gaddeya teṟatettu Āṟu hāḍa yeṁṇeya naḍasi bahadu
yī dharṁmada pārupatyavamāḍi khārukarāṇa naḍasi baheveṁdu hanoṁdu mū
nūṟu barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsana yī dharṁmake tapidavaru vāraṇāsiyali sahasra
kapileya vadhisida pāpake hōharu . yiṁtapudake hanoṁdu mūnū
ṟaṟa suhastada dōṣa śrī Anaṁtadēvaru yi śāsanakke sākṣigaḷu
Āditya caṁdrāvanilānalauca dhyaurbhūmi rāpōhrudayaṁ ya
maśca Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhauca saṁdhyē dharṁmaśca jānāti narasya Urattaṁ
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
